statement: In every magma, Equation 2715 (`x = ((y * x) * (y * z)) * w`) implies Equation 1630 (`x = (x * x) * ((x * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0317
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op y z)) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op x x) (op (op x x) y))
